About: It is about combating fascism, initially Nazism, and later neo-Nazism.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with militant groups and individuals on the political left.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the political movement in Germany.
ConsistsOf: It consists of multiple militant groups and individuals on the political left.
CreatedBy: It was created by the then-Stalinist Communist Party of Germany KPD.
CreatedIn: It was created in the late history of the Weimar Republic.
HasA: It has a primary activity of combating fascism.
It has existed in different eras and incarnations.
It has roots in the West German Außerparlamentarische Opposition left-wing student movement.
It has splintered into different groups and factions.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by combating fascism.
It is characterized by its primary activity.
It is characterized by its existence in different eras and incarnations.
It is characterized by its roots in the West German Außerparlamentarische Opposition left-wing student movement.
It is characterized by its adoption of aesthetics from the first movement.
It is characterized by ideological dissimilarity to the first movement.
It is characterized by its leaning towards anarcho-communism.
It is characterized by its splintering into different groups and factions.
It is characterized by its description as part of the extreme left by German government institutions.
It is characterized by its partial violence as described by German government institutions.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the Maoist Communist League.
It was influenced by West Germany's squatter scene.
It was influenced by the left-wing autonomism movement.
IsA: It is a political movement in Germany.
It is composed of multiple militant groups and individuals on the political left.
It is a contemporary movement with no direct organizational connection to Antifaschistische Aktion.
It is considered part of the extreme left.
KnownAs: It is known as the wider antifa movement.
KnownFor: It is known for combating fascism.
OccurredIn: It occurred in different eras and incarnations.
It occurred in the late history of the Weimar Republic.
It occurred in the postwar era.
PartOf: It is part of the extreme left.
It is part of the political movement in Germany.
UsedFor: It is used for combating fascism.

About: それはファシズム、当初はナチズム、そして後にネオナチズムと戦うことについてです。
Affects: それは左翼に影響を与えます。
AssociatedWith: それは左翼の複数の過激派グループや個人と関連しています。
BelongsTo: それはドイツの政治運動に属しています。
ConsistsOf: それは左翼の複数の過激派グループや個人で構成されています。
CreatedBy: それは当時のスターリン主義ドイツ共産党（KPD）によって作成されました。
CreatedIn: それはワイマール共和国の後期の歴史の中で作成されました。
HasA: それはファシズムと戦うことを主な活動としています。

それは異なるグループや派閥に分裂しています。

それはドイツ政府機関によって極左の一部と記述されていることを特徴としています。
